executionHistory.summary: Created spec.md with problem statement, actors, outcome contract, 6 use cases, 10 business scenarios, 7 requirements with Gherkin, and success metrics. Identified 4 missing YAML config entries and confirmed Discord entry exists but is unwired.

Created design.md covering registration pattern, per-connector config wiring (Discord, Twitter, Weather, Gov Alerts, Financial Markets), YAML config blocks, env var mapping, config generation script changes, helper functions, and testing strategy. All 5 connectors follow existing 9-connector pattern exactly.
Created scopes.md with 1 scope (wire all 5 connectors — imports, registration, YAML config, config.sh, health endpoint). Created report.md and uservalidation.md templates.

Wired all 5 connectors: added imports, instantiation, registration, and auto-start blocks in cmd/core/main.go. Added 4 YAML config blocks to config/smackerel.yaml. Extended scripts/commands/config.sh with yaml_get_json helper and env var extraction for all 5 connectors. Added parseJSONArray, parseJSONObject, parseFloatEnv helper functions. Build succeeds, all unit tests pass.

Manual cross-check verified spec implementation files exist on disk: cmd/core/connectors.go (378 lines, 15 connector imports/registrations/auto-start blocks), cmd/core/helpers.go (parseJSONArray/parseJSONObject/parseFloatEnv), config/smackerel.yaml (5 connector blocks: discord/twitter/weather/gov-alerts/financial-markets), scripts/commands/config.sh (yaml_get_json helper + env extractions for all 5). go test passes for discord/twitter/weather/alerts/markets packages.
